title: Patch sales-history status endpoint to fast non-spatial summary
command:
$ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; Write-Output 'TASK: /map/sales-history/status hizli patch + test'; Write-Output 'PROGRESS: 94%'; Write-Output 'ESTIMATED_WAIT: 7-10 dakika'; $startTime=Get-Date; Write-Output 'START_TIME:'; Write-Output $startTime; $run=Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss'; $reportDir=Join-Path (Get-Location) ('.aays_next_fix\status_fast_patch_' + $run); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $reportDir | Out-Null; $file='app\api\routes\aays_sales_history_layers.py'; $backup=Join-Path $reportDir 'aays_sales_history_layers.py.bak'; Copy-Item -Force $file $backup; Write-Output ('BACKUP=' + $backup); $text=Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $file; $start=$text.IndexOf('@router.get("/map/sales-history/status")'); $end=$text.IndexOf('@router.get("/map/sales-history/external-evidence")'); Write-Output ('STATUS_BLOCK_START=' + $start); Write-Output ('STATUS_BLOCK_END=' + $end); if($start -lt 0 -or $end -lt 0 -or $end -le $start){ Write-Output 'PATCH_ABORTED: status block boundaries not found'; exit 2 }; $replacement = @'
@router.get(

return _fetch(sql)


'@; $newText=$text.Substring(0,$start)+$replacement+$text.Substring($end); Set-Content -Encoding UTF8 $file $newText; Write-Output 'PATCH_APPLIED=status fast non-spatial'; Write-Output 'PY_COMPILE:'; python -m py_compile $file 2>&1; Write-Output 'RESTART_API:'; docker compose restart api 2>&1; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Write-Output 'ENDPOINT_TESTS:'; $eps=@('/health','/map/sales-history/status','/map/listings','/map/sales-history/external-evidence','/map/sales-history/parcels','/map/sales-history/combined'); foreach($ep in $eps){ $url='http://localhost:8010'+$ep; Write-Output ('TEST '+$ep); try{ $sw=[System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch]::StartNew(); $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 35; $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('OK status='+[string]$r.StatusCode+' ms='+[string]$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds+' bytes='+[string]$r.Content.Length); if($ep -eq '/map/sales-history/status'){ Write-Output ($r.Content.Substring(0,[Math]::Min(1200,$r.Content.Length))) } } catch { $sw.Stop(); Write-Output ('FAIL ms='+[string]$sw.ElapsedMilliseconds+' error='+$_.Exception.Message) } }; Write-Output 'STATUS_SOURCE_SCAN_AFTER:'; Select-String -Path $file -Pattern 'fast_non_spatial_status_v1|ST_Intersects|map_parcel_counts|def status' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -First 80 | ForEach-Object { $_.LineNumber.ToString()+': '+$_.Line }; Write-Output 'API_LOG_TAIL:'; docker logs --tail 120 terrayield_land_api 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'sales-history/status|error|exception|traceback|geography' -CaseSensitive:$false | Select-Object -Last 80 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line }; $endTime=Get-Date; Write-Output 'END_TIME:'; Write-Output $endTime; Write-Output ('ELAPSED_SECONDS=' + [int](($endTime-$startTime).TotalSeconds)); Write-Output 'STATUS_FAST_PATCH_DONE'
note: Backs up and patches only /map/sales-history/status to avoid heavy spatial count. Wait 10 minutes before continue.
